settings.heading: What are Cherokee Tooniforms men's scrubs?
settings.content: Cherokee Tooniforms men's scrubs are cartoon-inspired healthcare uniforms built for professionals who want the perfect balance of personality and professionalism on shift. Whether you work with kids or just want to lighten the mood, Tooniforms help you make a positive impact on both patients and your team.

settings.heading: What fabric are Cherokee Tooniforms men's scrubs made from?
settings.content: Tooniforms men's tops and jackets are made with a performance fabric blend of recycled polyester, spandex, and cotton. The breathable, moisture-wicking material keeps you cool and comfortable through busy shifts while holding up to long-lasting wear. The blend is built to maintain its comfort and print quality through repeated washing.

settings.heading: What character prints are available in Cherokee Tooniforms for men?
settings.content: The men's Tooniforms lineup features licensed prints from some of the most recognizable franchises in pop culture. Current prints include characters from Disney (Mickey Mouse and friends), Peanuts (Snoopy), Marvel (superhero and comic hero prints), Looney Tunes, Star Wars, and Pixar (Toy Story, Up). New prints are released regularly, keeping the lineup fresh with the latest characters and styles.

settings.heading: Are Cherokee Tooniforms men's scrubs good for pediatric settings?
settings.content: Tooniforms men's scrubs are a strong choice for pediatric and family care settings. These men’s scrubs are a great choice for healthcare professionals who work with children or want to bring a more approachable, lighthearted feel to their workday. Featuring recognizable character prints from Disney, Marvel, Star Wars, and Looney Tunes, they can help create a friendly connection with patients of all ages.
